name: industry-brief-generator-plugin
description: A bilingual Codex plugin for candidate-first industry brief generation.

interface.shortDescription: 20 sourced topics first, final brief after human selection.
interface.longDescription: A bilingual candidate-first workflow for industry briefings. Input an industry, market, focus topics, exclusions, and final use. The plugin generates a sourced candidate pool first, waits for selected item numbers, then creates the final brief, poster, and channel copy.
defaultPrompt: 使用 $industry-brief-generator-zh 生成行业快报候选池。
Create 20 candidate topics before final publishing.
